creator: ap@myway.noses.com
text:
ap@myway:~/ 101->pib
Application initialization failed: no display name and no $DISPLAY environment variable
Error in startup script: couldn't load file "/usr/local/lib/pib/libTkSteal.so.2.0": cannot stat "/usr/local/lib/pib/libTkSteal.so.2.0" : No such file or directory
    while executing
"load $Status(homedir)/libTkSteal.so.2.0"
    (procedure "main" line 21)
    invoked from within
"main"
    (file "/usr/local/bin/pib" line 2384)

Fix: 

Of course there is no .so.2.0 on an ELF system. Fix: change /usr/local/bin/pib.


Achim
